concepts.title: Protocol Attack Surface
concepts.description: Every protocol feature embeds a trust assumption; that assumption is the attack vector.

concepts.title: TCP/IP Attack Techniques
concepts.description: SYN flood and RST injection exploiting TCP connection state management.

concepts.title: ARP Spoofing
concepts.description: Exploiting ARP's trust-last-reply-wins model to perform LAN MITM.

concepts.title: HTTP Protocol Vulnerabilities
concepts.description: Host header injection, request smuggling exploiting HTTP trust assumptions.

concepts.title: DNS Architecture and Hierarchy
concepts.description: Recursive resolution, authoritative servers, caching, and trust model.

concepts.title: DNS Attack Techniques
concepts.description: Cache poisoning, tunneling, DGA, and zone transfer enumeration.

concepts.title: DNS Defensive Controls
concepts.description: DNSSEC, CAA records, split-horizon DNS, zone transfer restriction.

concepts.title: CBC Mode Vulnerabilities
concepts.description: Padding oracle attacks: BEAST, Lucky13, POODLE exploiting MAC-then-encrypt separation.

concepts.title: AEAD Cipher Modes
concepts.description: AES-GCM and ChaCha20-Poly1305: combined encryption and authentication.

concepts.title: TLS Cipher Suite Selection
concepts.description: Correct TLS 1.3 suites; TLS 1.2 disabled families; OWASP/NIST guidance.

concepts.title: TLS Version Policy
concepts.description: TLS 1.3 vs 1.2 — RFC 8446 obsoletes vs prohibits; acceptable configurations.

concepts.title: Forward Secrecy
concepts.description: ECDHE ephemeral key exchange; session independence; harvest-now-decrypt-later protection.

concepts.title: Key Derivation Functions for Password Storage
concepts.description: bcrypt, Argon2id parameters; GPU resistance; 72-byte truncation mitigation.

concepts.title: PKI Certificate Chain Validation
concepts.description: RFC 5280 four-check validation: signature, validity, revocation, path length.

concepts.title: SHA Hash Function Selection
concepts.description: SHA-1 deprecation; SHA-256/384/512 for data integrity; SHA vs KDF distinction.

concepts.title: Linux Permissions Model
concepts.description: rwx triplet, SUID/SGID bits, sudo configuration, privilege escalation paths.

concepts.title: Linux Filesystem Security
concepts.description: FHS as a detection map; key security directories; persistence locations.

concepts.title: Bash Security Investigation Pipelines
concepts.description: grep/awk/sort/uniq pipelines for log analysis, failed logins, filesystem investigation.

concepts.title: OS Persistence Mechanisms
concepts.description: Linux cron/systemd/authorized_keys; Windows Run keys/scheduled tasks/WMI subscriptions.

concepts.title: Persistence Detection via Baselining
concepts.description: Snapshot/diff methodology; Sysmon registry and WMI events; exclusion-list tuning.

concepts.title: Windows Security Event Logs
concepts.description: Event 4624 LogonType/LmPackageName/IpAddress; Event 4662; Event 4698.

concepts.title: Sysmon Event Coverage
concepts.description: Events 1/3/7/10/12/13/19/20/21/22; ProcessGUID correlation; Sysmon configuration.

concepts.title: Multi-Source Event Correlation
concepts.description: ProcessGUID/SessionGUID joins; four-source kill chain; SIEM correlation patterns.

concepts.title: Windows Registry Security
concepts.description: Seven critical registry persistence and hijacking paths; IFEO abuse.

concepts.title: NTLM Authentication Attacks
concepts.description: Pass-the-hash: hash-as-credential mechanism, LSASS dump, Event 4624 detection.

concepts.title: Kerberoasting
concepts.description: RC4 service ticket request; offline cracking; Event 4769 detection signature.

concepts.title: Layered Authentication Controls
concepts.description: MFA + PAWs + JIT targeting different mechanisms for effective defence-in-depth.

concepts.title: Control Bypass and Paired Detection
concepts.description: Every preventative control has a bypass; detection is the necessary complement.
